text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
78 
CVRD_DAYS_NF 
LABEL: 
Count of Medicaid Covered Days in a Nursing Facility 
DESCRIPTION: The number of days of nursing care included in this claim that were paid for, in whole or in part, by 
Medicaid. Includes days during which nursing facility received partial payment for holding a bed during 
patient leave days. 
SHORT NAME: CVRD_DAYS_NF 
LONG NAME: CVRD_DAYS_NF 
TYPE: 
NUM
